hook.text: UGARTE HITS THE WOODWORK AT THE WORLD CUP

beats.text: SAUDI ARABIA LED URUGUAY IN THEIR WORLD CUP OPENER
UNITED'S UGARTE HIT THE POST IN THE COMEBACK
URUGUAY CAME BACK TO SECURE A VITAL 1-1 DRAW

caption: United's Manuel Ugarte showed his class on the world stage 🔴 The Uruguayan midfielder hit the woodwork as his country came from behind to earn a hard-fought 1-1 draw with Saudi Arabia in their World Cup Group H opener. Unlucky — but the performance was there. Who's your favourite Red to watch at this World Cup? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #ugarte #uruguay
